project_type: TypeScript monorepo with pnpm workspaces, Next.js apps, Fastify backends, and shared packages
build_system: pnpm + turborepo, each package has its own tsconfig.json extending root tsconfig.json
test_framework: vitest v2.1.9 with inline test files in __tests__/ directories
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm --filter @quant/quantads typecheck - must pass clean. 2. Run pnpm --filter @quant/quantads test - all tests must pass.
setup_instructions: Node modules already installed via pnpm. No further setup needed.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node.js 22, pnpm available. No docker needed for validation.
contribution_requirements: One logical grouping per commit. Conventional commits. Tests must be meaningful (test real logic). Coverage >=70% on core modules.
key_patterns: 1. App Router pattern: see apps/quantsync/src/app/ for layout.tsx + page.tsx using shared-ui components. 2. API client pattern: see apps/quantsync/src/services/api-client.ts for typed fetch wrapper using NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL env var. 3. Provider pattern: ThemeProvider + CommandPaletteUI in app-providers.tsx, QueryProvider wraps TanStack React Query. 4. shared-ui exports: Button, Input, Modal, Avatar, Card, Badge, Toast, Loader, ThemeProvider, CommandPaletteUI, LoadingState, ErrorState. 5. Brand tokens used via CSS variables: --quant-foreground, --quant-background, --quant-muted, etc. 6. next.config.mjs transpilePackages for workspace packages.
directory_structure: apps/quantads/ has backend/ (fastify routes+services) and src/ (frontend: pages/, components/, hooks/, services/, mobile/, __tests__/). The current frontend is NOT using Next.js - pages are plain function exports returning object descriptors (not JSX). Need to convert to Next.js App Router.
